activation_dependency_binding.controlling_source_fact: CAL-ACR-022 specifies DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P for RC-7, completed before activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022

final_answer: ALLOW. Platform operations may activate telemetry service. All four policy-required boundaries (device group, site, release condition, timing) exactly match in source. packet_022a_invented_site_18l gate failure is spurious: no source document references Site 18-L in this activation dependency chain; source records (ACT-ACR-022, CAL-ACR-022, SITE-ACR-022) consistently specify Site 18-P. NOTE-ACR-022 prefix warning does not override explicit production-unit specification in CAL-ACR-022. Binding EXACT_ACTIVATION_DEPENDENCY_CLOSED substantively satisfied.
warning_or_prelim_artifact_handling: packet_022a_invented_site_18l gate failure is a constraint artifact with no source corroboration. Source documents (ACT-ACR-022, CAL-ACR-022, SITE-ACR-022) exclusively reference Site 18-P.
